name: loud-cannabis-store
description: Cannabis store with customer and manager portals

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../customer-portal && npm install && cd ../manager-portal && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,frontends -c green,blue "npm run dev:server" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5000/api/health && npm run dev:frontends"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:customer && npm run build:manager
